description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8.9 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Include a before_script that runs `npm install gitbook-cli -g`, `gitbook fetch 3.2.3`, and `gitbook install` before each job. Define two stages, test and deploy: the test job runs in the test stage, executes `gitbook build . public`, and runs on all branches except master (only branches, except master). The pages job runs in the deploy stage, executes the same `gitbook build . public` command, publishes the public/ folder as a Pages artifact that expires after one week, and only runs on the master branch.
